# Linear Plumbing & Drain Cleaning

> Plumber serving Albany, NY and surrounding areas. Linear Plumbing & Drain Cleaning provides quality plumber services in Albany, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Linear Plumbing & Drain Cleaning
- Category: Plumber
- Location: Serving Albany, NY, Albany, NY
- Phone: 518-320-6158
- Email: contact@linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Drain Cleaning](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/drain-cleaning/): Fast, effective drain cleaning that clears blockages and keeps water flowing.
- [Pipe Repair](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/pipe-repair/): Expert pipe repair for leaks, bursts, and corrosion in homes and businesses.
- [Water Heater](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/water-heater/): Water heater installation, repair, and maintenance for reliable hot water.
- [Sewer Line](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/sewer-line/): Complete sewer line inspection, cleaning, and repair services.
- [Fixture Install](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/fixture-install/): Professional fixture installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and utility spaces.
- [Emergency Plumbing](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/plumber/linear-plumbing-drain-cleaning//services/emergency-plumber/): 24/7 emergency plumbing service when you need it most.
